sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; function Gallery() { const [selectedImage, setSelectedImage] = useState(null); const galleryImages = [ { id: 1, title: 'Frame 01', category: 'Gallery', image: '/gallery/1726854847155.JPG', description: 'Local photo imported from C:\\NewPhotos.', accent: 'md:row-span-2 md:col-span-2', }, { id: 2, title: 'Frame 02', category: 'Gallery', image: '/gallery/IMG_0538.JPG', description: 'Local photo imported from C:\\NewPhotos.', accent: 'md:col-span-1', }, { id: 3, title: 'Frame 03', category: 'Gallery', image: '/gallery/IMG_3364.JPG', description: 'Local photo imported from C:\\NewPhotos.', accent: 'md:col-span-1 md:row-span-2', }, { id: 4, title: 'Frame 04', category: 'Gallery', image: '/gallery/IMG_5574.JPG', description: 'Local photo imported from C:\\NewPhotos.', accent: 'md:col-span-1', }, { id: 5, title: 'Frame 05', category: 'Gallery', image: '/gallery/IMG_5881.JPG', description: 'Local photo imported from C:\\NewPhotos.', accent: 'md:col-span-2', }, { id: 6, title: 'Frame 06', category: 'Gallery', image: '/gallery/WhatsApp%20Image%202026-04-28%20at%203.23.21%20AM%20(1).jpeg', description: 'Local photo imported from C:\\NewPhotos.', accent: 'md:col-span-1', }, { id: 7, title: 'Frame 07', category: 'Gallery', image: '/gallery/WhatsApp%20Image%202026-04-28%20at%203.23.21%20AM.jpeg', description: 'Local photo imported from C:\\NewPhotos.', accent: 'md:col-span-1', }, { id: 8, title: 'Frame 08', category: 'Gallery', image: '/gallery/WhatsApp%20Image%202026-04-28%20at%203.23.22%20AM.jpeg', description: 'Local photo imported from C:\\NewPhotos.', accent: 'md:col-span-2', }, ]; return (

Visual Archive

Gallery of selected frames and design studies.

A compact collection of visual experiments, photography, and brand explorations arranged like an editorial contact sheet.

Frames

08

Direction

Minimal, image-first, and intentionally compact.

{galleryImages.map((item) => ( ))}
{selectedImage && (
setSelectedImage(null)} >
e.stopPropagation()} >

{selectedImage.category}

{selectedImage.title}

{selectedImage.description}

Frame #{String(selectedImage.id).padStart(2, '0')}

)}
); } export default Gallery;
